title: dodecatheon pauciflorum subsp. monanthum
intro: Dodecatheon pauciflorum subsp. monanthum is a rare, flowering plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is also known as the one-flowered shooting star due to its unique, star-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of Dodecatheon pauciflorum subsp. monanthum can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves to help alleviate various health issues, such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems.
